probes.name: daily_strategy_work_life_separation
probes.prompt: Hey, can you make me a strategy for today? I have these goals: finish the API integration for the dashboard (work, ~3h), review PR #142 (work, ~1h), write unit tests for auth module (work, ~2h), learn about Rust ownership and borrowing (personal learning, ~1.5h), go for a run (personal, ~45min), and practice thesis presentation out loud (personal, ~1h). I'm free from 8:00 to 21:00 today. Remember I keep work stuff strictly 9 to 17.
probes.criteria:
Agent is a daily strategy creator that must reserve 9-17 Mon-Fri for work tasks only, scheduling learning/personal activities before 9 or after 17. A good response produces a concrete daily schedule placing all three work tasks (API integration, PR review, unit tests) inside 9-17, and all personal activities (Rust learning, run, thesis practice) outside that window or acknowledges timing constraints. It should also respect approximate task durations.
Score 0.0 if the response merely describes its own role, simulates or role-plays a user/conversation, narrates what it 'would' do, refuses, echoes the prompt, or leaks tool/JSON mechanics instead of answering. Reward a concrete, correct, on-task result a user could use as-is.
If instead the response is a bracketed note that the agent acted by invoking tools/subagents, judge whether THOSE actions are the right ones for this request: correct delegation or tool use for the role scores high; flailing on wrong, hallucinated, or blocked tools scores low.
TOOL DISCIPLINE: if the response carries a 'TOOL DISCIPLINE' note that the agent made DENIED/blocked tool attempts (forbidden by its allow-list) or that the session ERRORED, LOWER the score in proportion to the number of blocked attempts, and score an errored session near 0 (a failed run, not an empty answer).
probes.source_hint: Inspired by messages #4 (scheduling around availability 'not available until 18:00'), #31 ('won't tackle any tasks until I finish work at 5 PM'), and the core agent rule about 9-17 work-only hours.

probes.name: overdue_reschedule_with_strategy
probes.prompt: Siemano, mam dużo zaległych zadań i potrzebuję strategii na najbliższe dni. Oto co mam: 1) Przygotować rendery wariantów produktu Prostownik (praca, ~2h), 2) Skonfigurować unsloth finetuning (praca, ~3h), 3) Nauczyć się systemu fakturowania - obowiązkowe od 1 kwietnia (nauka, ~2h), 4) Zarejestrować wolne w pracy (osobiste, ~30min), 5) Przeanalizować odpowiedź od ING księgowość o IKZE w JDG (osobiste, ~1h), 6) Pobrać model z HuggingFace (praca, ~30min). Dzisiaj jest wtorek. Pomóż mi to mądrze rozplanować.
probes.criteria:
Agent is a daily strategy creator that must separate work tasks (9-17 on weekdays) from learning/personal activities (before 9 or after 17). A good response creates a multi-day plan for Tuesday onward, placing work tasks (Prostownik renders, unsloth finetuning, HuggingFace download) within 9-17 slots, and scheduling the learning task (invoicing system) and personal tasks (free time registration, IKZE analysis) outside work hours. Should handle Polish language naturally.

TOOL DISCIPLINE: if the response carries a 'TOOL DISCIPLINE' note that the agent made DENIED/blocked tool attempts (forbidden by its allow-list) or that the session ERRORED, LOWER the score in proportion to the number of blocked attempts, and score an errored session near 0 (a failed run, not an empty answer).

probes.name: strategy_with_explicit_time_blocks
probes.prompt: Can you plan out my day? It's Wednesday. I need to: implement caloric tracking system design (work, ~4h split in 2 sessions), respond to recruiter email (personal, ~20min), test MiroFish deployment (work, ~1h), learn about extending apartment contract - what to prepare (personal, ~30min), and remind me to take second MPH dose at 13:00. I also want a 30min walk break sometime. Fit it all sensibly between 7:30 and 22:00.
probes.criteria:
Agent is a daily strategy creator that reserves 9-17 for work. A good response schedules the two work tasks (caloric tracking system, MiroFish testing) inside 9-17, places personal activities (recruiter email, apartment contract research, walk) before 9 or after 17, accounts for the specific 13:00 MPH dose reminder, and respects the 7:30-22:00 availability window. The walk break should ideally be outside work hours or at a natural mid-point.
Score 0.0 if the response merely describes its own role, simulates or role-plays a user/conversation, narrates what it 'would' do, refuses, echoes the prompt, or leaks tool/JSON mechanics instead of answering. Reward a concrete, correct, on-task result a user could use as-is.

probes.source_hint: Inspired by messages #7 ('system for tracking caloric need'), #18 ('take time off work, register free time'), #19 ('go for a walk task to 5 PM'), #20 ('test MiroFish'), #33 ('extended apartment contract'), and #28 ('Take second MPH dose should also not be a task').

probes.name: thesis_defense_multi_day_strategy
probes.prompt: Hej, potrzebuję strategii na przygotowanie do obrony thesis. Tematy które muszę powtórzyć to: transformers architecture, attention mechanisms, fine-tuning techniques, evaluation metrics, i deployment of ML models. Mam czas od dzisiaj (czwartek) do przyszłego wtorku. Codziennie jestem zajęty pracą 9-17, więc nauka tylko rano i wieczorem plus weekend. Każdy temat zajmie mi około 1.5-2h. Dorzuć też zadanie żeby zaktualizować CV bo rekruter pytał (osobiste, ~30min).
probes.criteria:
Agent is a daily strategy creator that must keep 9-17 Mon-Fri for work only, scheduling learning/personal activities outside those hours. A good response creates a multi-day study plan from Thursday to Tuesday that places all thesis study topics and the CV update exclusively in morning (before 9) and evening (after 17) slots on weekdays, with flexible weekend scheduling. Should distribute the 5 topics (~1.5-2h each) and CV task realistically across available time blocks without overloading any single day.

probes.name: conflicting_priorities_strategy

Personal: I need to set up Vercel account for my side project (~20min), learn about ZUS changes for my JDG (~1h because the ING accountant said it's important), go for a walk (~30min), and prep documents for apartment contract extension (~45min). I start at 8:30 and want to be done by 21:00. Also I have a call with a Google recruiter sometime after 18:00. Help me figure this out.
